headline: 4 Must-Buy Retail Stocks as Lower Gas Prices Boost Consumer Confidence
summary: Lower gas prices lift confidence in June, putting Five Below, Casey's, Ross Stores and Dollar Tree in focus as shoppers stay selective.

headline: Dollar Tree: It Is Still Not Too Late To Get In
summary: Dollar Tree's Q results show 7.2% sales growth and comps up to 3.5%. Click here to read in detail about the DLTR stock.
